chat_to_github_write.add_issue_comment_connector: BROKEN - requires user confirmation popup (platform behavior)
chat_to_github_write.push_from_owner_pat: BROKEN - GitHub blocks owner PAT from triggering workflows
chat_to_github_write.repository_dispatch: WORKS - triggers GitHub Actions without popup

how_gpt_triggers_engine.method: GET — no curl, no POST, no JSON body needed
how_gpt_triggers_engine.step_2: Deno verifies token, calls POST /repos/.../dispatches with event_type=autonomy-engine
how_gpt_triggers_engine.step_4: Engine runs production_loop and commits results

endpoints.GET /autonomy-trigger: GPT trigger with query params — NO curl needed

blocker.description: Deno Playground нужно обновить до v3.1 кода из governance/deno_webhook.js
blocker.action: Открыть deno.com/deploy → проект → вставить код из governance/deno_webhook.js → Save and Deploy
blocker.after_deploy: GPT может открыть URL и engine запустится автономно без Shell
